sexstories.com

We are building a large collection of sex-related texts, easy to navigate, categorized, without advertising. Anyone can have us publish their texts, for free. Register here to submit. Note that AOL is blocking all emails mentionning 'xnxx.com'. If you have troubles registering, just email us and we will create an account for you.

Some texts can hurt sensibilities, but we feel the need to have them for various reasons we will not explain here and now. In fact, 'on the edge' themes are much more popular than others, as you can see by the 'views' and 'rating' numbers, they are real and have never been edited.

We can add new features to our pages. Let us know if you would like something added.
